_README: EDIT THIS FILE to deploy Paperline for a different project. All project-specific behavior (contacts, relevance rules, capture provider+config, report templates) reads from here. NO Python source edits needed for a deployment. The SQLite schema is stable across kit versions; the field comments below explain each section.

project.name: <PROJECT NAME -- short, e.g. 'Acme vendor renewal' or 'Smith remodel'>

contacts._doc: One entry per canonical contact (person or org). slug must be kebab-case unique. email_addresses is also used by capture + relevance filters. license_info is an optional free-form dict for any structured identifier you want to record (e.g. {'license_no': '12345', 'state': 'TX'} or {'vendor_id': 'V-9911'}).
contacts.role: The party whose perspective drives this corpus -- e.g. project lead, account owner, primary contact
contacts.notes: Outbound correspondence is captured under the user's mailbox.

contacts.role: The principal contact you are coordinating / negotiating with
contacts.notes: Add as many entries as the project has distinct contacts.

scope_rules._doc: Used by classify_scope.py. A message is marked relevant (in_scope = 1) if any pattern matches. off_scope_sender_patterns auto-exclude. All patterns are Python regex, applied case-insensitively.

report_templates._doc: Used by render_current_state.py and render_obsidian.py. headline_open_items renders as bullets in current-state.md; obsidian_in_scope_section_heading is the H2 in master-timeline.md; extra_quick_links adds project-specific links to current-state.md.
headline_open_items: Replace these with your project's open items, e.g.:
**Other party unresponsive on item X** -- raised in messages of <date1>, <date2>; not addressed.

capture._doc: Used by capture_recent_targeted.py. provider selects the email-source backend ('yahoo_browser' = Playwright/CDP against debug Chrome :9222 with Yahoo Mail logged in; 'gmail_imap' = imap.gmail.com via IMAP with an App Password). The address whitelist gates writes at the per-message level so irrelevant mail can never reach disk.
capture._gmail_doc: Only used when provider=='gmail_imap'. One-time setup: enable 2FA on the Gmail account, generate an App Password at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords, then export it as the env var named in gmail_app_password_env (default GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD) before running capture_recent_targeted.py. Spaces in the App Password are stripped automatically.
capture._query_doc: search_queries is the list of search terms run against the chosen provider. For yahoo_browser these are plain keywords (Yahoo URL search does not support from:/to: operators). For gmail_imap each query may use prefixes: 'from:address', 'to:address', 'subject:keyword', 'since:YYYY-MM-DD', 'before:YYYY-MM-DD' -- combinable in a single query string.
